financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well because it keeps making more money each quarter.
Some parts of the business are facing difficulties, but overall, it's running efficiently.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is handling risks well, but there are challenges like weak demand and unexpected costs that could affect future growth.
They are cautious with currency changes, but some industries they work with are spending less due to global issues.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well in managing social and governance issues, which boosts its overall score.
Environmental efforts are average, suggesting room for improvement in how the company handles environmental matters.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke confidently about their plans and how well things are going.
Even when asked tough questions, they stayed positive about the future and how they will handle challenges.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company shared clear details about their spending on subcontractors and plans for their workers.
They were unclear about future earnings and blamed outside factors without giving specific financial plans.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing okay, with some good and some challenging areas.
They believe they can grow in the future despite current challenges.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Average
bullets: Tech Mahindra is doing well in some areas, like big deals and certain industries, but struggles in others like Automotive.
The company is efficient and growing in some sectors, but uncertain economic conditions could affect future success.
